title: Oairse 4PCS Large Glitter Poinsettia Flowers Picks 12"/30cm Gold Artificial Christmas Flowers with Long Stem Christmas Tree Decorations for Xmas Tree Ornaments Wedding New Year Halloween
features: Package Content - You will receive 4 pieces of glitter poinsettia flowers picks with long stem that sufficient for you to decorate and add a warm atmosphere to your Christmas.
Material - Artificial poinsettia flowers are made of flexible velvet which is delicate and beautiful. Covered with glitter powder, which make the tree more attractive and add more holiday atmosphere.

Size - Each flower head is 30cm/12 inch in diameter, and each stem is 45cm/18 inch tall in total. Perfect for tucking into the bare spots of the christmas tree, wreath and garland or as flower arrangement in a vase.

Xmas Decor - Faux poinsettia flowers have proper sizes and lightweight enough to clip onto the boughs of your tree, dress up a garland, finish a bow-tied gift, around your fireplace or attach them on your Christmas Eve candle centerpieces.

Wide Application - Poinsettia ornaments are not only beautiful christmas decorations for christmas tree, wreaths, table and Christmas floral arrangements, but also good for decorating on birthday party, wedding, Thanksgiving Day, New Year, photography scene setting or other festival decor.

High Quality Glitter Plated The artificial leaves petal is fully covered with high quality glitter, making it look shiny. Tree Decorations and Floral Arrangement The long stem artificial Christmas leaves are suitable for Christmas Day flower arrangement, and the stem is bendable, so it is also suitable for Christmas tree decoration.
